title: Connect and Operate MCP in Codex and Claude · Spiral Review
summary: Configure one safe server in both Codex and Claude Code. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for cross-client MCP configuration and smoke tests after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure scoped Codex STDIO or HTTP servers, timeouts, tools, approvals, and authentication.
Configure Claude Code local, project, or user MCP scope and review shared server trust.
Verify initialization, primitive discovery, tool calls, errors, and shutdown in each client.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
